summary: New onRequest access-log hook emits request.url raw; share-link routes register /share-links/:token/preview and /share-links/:token/accept; tokens land in pino logs.

must_not_find.reason: errorHandler's sanitizeUrl regex works correctly for backend routes; reviewer must not invent a 'regex too narrow' finding because the only backend route pattern is /share-links/<token>/...
Pre-existing files unchanged in this diff; must not flag content from share/index.ts as PR-introduced.

tolerance.note: Reviewer may legitimately surface a FIX-FOLLOWUP suggesting Sentry breadcrumb redaction even though that's adjacent to the BLOCK; one such adjacency finding is allowed.
